overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school RPG showing a Ravenclaw student exploring a Divination classroom filled with crystal balls and tapestries, ascending to an upper gallery, and descending a spiral staircase into a grand hall. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with gothic stone architecture and magical props.

scene_state.functional_zone: Divination classroom with crystal ball tables and tapestries

events.description: character circles the central divination table examining the crystal balls and artifacts
character turns toward the curved staircase and begins ascending

agents.ego_description: walking around the classroom examining the divination props and crystal ball table

notable_agents.action: Professor Onai standing near the chalkboard with astrological diagrams

entered.detail: Large colorful wall tapestry depicting floral and nature motifs with ornate borders
Heavy wooden table cluttered with crystal balls, candles, and divination props
Tall chalkboard with an astrological star chart and diagrams drawn on it
Ornate ceramic vase with narrow neck sitting on the floor against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores the ground floor of a Divination classroom, walking past a large nature tapestry and circling a central table covered with crystal balls. Professor Onai stands near a chalkboard in the background as natural light filters through tall windows with purple curtains.

scene_state.functional_zone: Upper gallery with astronomical instruments and blue curtains

events.description: character ascends the curved stone staircase to the upper gallery level
character approaches Professor Onai standing near the blue patterned curtains

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved staircase and exploring the upper gallery near the large globe

notable_agents.action: Professor Onai standing by the blue curtains facing the wall tapestry

entered.detail: Spiral stone steps with carved wooden railings leading to the upper level
Large terrestrial globe on an ornate wooden stand with brass fittings
Heavy blue curtains with gold geometric patterns hanging beside stone columns
Large tapestry depicting a wizard with scythe and hourglass against a starry night sky

segments.scene_description: Ascending the curved stone staircase to the upper gallery, the character passes blue patterned curtains and examines a large antique globe. The professor is encountered near a wall tapestry depicting a wizard, before the character approaches a wooden trapdoor in the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hidden spiral staircase shaft behind trapdoor

events.description: character opens the wooden trapdoor revealing the spiral staircase below
character descends the iron ladder into the narrow stone shaft

agents.ego_description: opening the trapdoor and climbing down the ladder into the hidden passage

entered.detail: Rectangular wooden floor hatch with iron hinges and a metal ring handle
Vertical metal ladder leading down into the dark shaft of the spiral staircase
Narrow cylindrical stone shaft with the spiral staircase visible below
Framed portraits hanging on the stone walls of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character opens a wooden trapdoor and descends an iron ladder into a narrow stone shaft. The lighting shifts to a darker, enclosed space as they climb down toward the spiral staircase below, with portrait frames visible on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: Grand spiral staircase with portrait gallery leading to main hall

events.description: character transitions from ladder to walking down the spiral stone steps
character reaches the bottom of the stairs and enters the grand hall with other students

agents.ego_description: walking down the long spiral staircase, passing another student going upward, then entering the grand hall

notable_agents.action: Student in dark robes walking up the spiral stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Ornate stone railing with red accents and carved pillars along the staircase edge
Tall gothic arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass letting in natural light
Large arched doorway at the bottom of the stairs leading to the main hall with ornate flooring

segments.scene_description: Walking down a long spiral stone staircase with arched windows and portrait-lined walls, the character passes another student going upward. The descent continues until reaching the bottom and emerging into a grand hall with ornate flooring, large stone pillars, and other students present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a sunlit Divination classroom and descends through a hidden shaft into a grand, ornate hall. It begins on the ground floor, circling a table of crystal balls and passing a large nature tapestry while natural light filters through purple curtains. As the camera ascends a curved stone staircase toward the upper gallery, the scene shifts past an antique globe and a wizard's tapestry before arriving at a wooden trapdoor. The perspective then plunges downward through a dark, enclosed stone shaft via an iron ladder, where the lighting dims and portrait frames line the narrow walls. Finally, the camera follows a long spiral staircase past arched windows and another student, emerging from the descent into a vast hall characterized by massive stone pillars and ornate flooring.
